description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Plastic thong style straps that start at the midfoot with a shimmery upper Soft plastic toe separator Stone embellishment at the axis of the slipper Padded synthetic leather footbed Outsole Durable TPU outsole with textured patterns for grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
